Container.Name: SeaDexArr-Audit
Container.Overview:
SeaDexArr audit mode — scans your Sonarr library against SeaDex, applies Sonarr tags (seadex / partial-seadex / seadex-upgrade-available / seadex-too-large), and sends Discord notifications when recommendations change. Never downloads, grabs, or replaces files.
Before starting: mount /config, then run the container once with AUDIT_ARGS=--dry-run to generate a config.yml template. Edit /config/config.yml with your Sonarr URL, API key, and Discord webhook before switching to --apply-tags.

Config.Description: Persistent config directory. Holds config.yml, cache.json, and audit_state.json.
audit = run audit on a repeating schedule (recommended). audit-once = run once and exit. sync = original grab/sync mode.
Hours between audit runs (only used when RUN_MODE=audit).

Flags passed to 'seadexarr audit'. Use --apply-tags to write Sonarr tags. Use --dry-run to preview without any mutations. Use --notify-only to send Discord without changing tags. Combine: --apply-tags (tags + Discord). Never downloads files regardless of setting.
Hours between runs when RUN_MODE=sync (original grab mode). Ignored in audit mode.
Log verbosity: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, CRITICAL.
